tool_args.label: SIR projections exclude MTA consolidated below-the-line adjustments

payload.claim_text: The SIR's projections do not include MTA consolidated below-the-line adjustments, including the estimated impacts of projected fare increases, which are presented as part of MTA consolidated materials.
payload.subject: MTA Staten Island Railway
payload.description: SIR budget projections exclude MTA consolidated below-the-line adjustments

payload.claim_text: Track Support: Retain 20 non-reimbursable positions for continual support of mainline track tie replacement under the spot tie replacement program.
payload.subject: MTA Staten Island Railway

tool_args.label: Maintenance of Way: Add two non-reimbursable positions

payload.claim_text: Maintenance of Way: Add two non-reimbursable positions for infrastructure supervisory and administrative functions.
payload.subject: MTA Staten Island Railway
payload.description: Key initiative - maintenance of way positions

payload.claim_text: Capital Support: Retain 12 reimbursable positions to support various capital projects.
payload.subject: MTA Staten Island Railway
